SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.organizer

Class WaitlistFragment

java.lang.Object
androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class WaitlistFragment extends androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
Fragment displaying the waitlist for an event. Allows the organizer to draw a lottery and notify waitlisted entrants.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    drawLottery()
    Calculates remaining capacity by checking existing invites/enrollments - randomly looks for replacements from waitlist Sends notifications to participants if selected/not selected
    private void
    loadEventCapacity()
    Loads the event capacity from Firestore.
    private void
    loadProfileInfo(String deviceId, int index)
    Fetches the entrant's profile name from Firestore using their device ID.
    private void
    loadWaitlistEntrants()
    Fetches all entrants from the selected event's waiting list collection in Firestore.
    static WaitlistFragment
    newInstance(String eventId)
    Use this factory method to create a new instance of this fragment using the provided parameters.
    private void
    notifyWaitlistEntrants()
    Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Waitlist".
    void
    onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Initializes the fragment, retrieves the event ID argument, and sets up Firestore.
    View
    onCreateView(LayoutInflater inflater, ViewGroup container, Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Inflates the fragment layout, initializes UI elements, and sets up the RecyclerView.
    void
    onResume()
    Reloads event capacity and waitlist entrants each time the tab becomes visible.
    private void
    sendPrivateInvite(String targetDeviceId, String eventId, String eventName, com.google.firebase.firestore.DocumentSnapshot userDoc)
    Pushes the notification and adds the user to the event's waiting list as Pending.
    private void
    showInviteDialog(String eventId, String eventName)
    Shows a dialog allowing the organizer to search for an entrant by email to invite them.

  • Method Details

    • newInstance

      public static WaitlistFragment newInstance(String eventId)
      Use this factory method to create a new instance of this fragment using the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event to display the waitlist for.
      Returns:
      A new instance of fragment WaitlistFragment.

    • onCreate

      public void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initializes the fragment, retrieves the event ID argument, and sets up Firestore.
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - the saved instance state bundle

    • onCreateView

      public View onCreateView(LayoutInflater inflater, ViewGroup container, Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Inflates the fragment layout, initializes UI elements, and sets up the RecyclerView.
      Overrides:
      onCreateView in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
      Parameters:
      inflater - the layout inflater
      container - the parent view group
      savedInstanceState - the saved instance state bundle
      Returns:
      the inflated view

    • onResume

      public void onResume()
      Reloads event capacity and waitlist entrants each time the tab becomes visible.
      Overrides:
      onResume in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment

    • loadEventCapacity

      private void loadEventCapacity()
      Loads the event capacity from Firestore.

    • loadWaitlistEntrants

      private void loadWaitlistEntrants()
      Fetches all entrants from the selected event's waiting list collection in Firestore. It stores each entrant's device ID and loads their profile name so it can be displayed in the ListView. If the waiting list is empty it displays "No one is on the waiting list."

    • loadProfileInfo

      private void loadProfileInfo(String deviceId, int index)
      Fetches the entrant's profile name from Firestore using their device ID. If a name is found, it replaces the temporary loading text in the ListView. If the profile cannot be loaded, the entrant is shown as an unknown user.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant whose profile is being loaded
      index - the position in the list where the entrant's name should be updated

    • drawLottery

      private void drawLottery()
      Calculates remaining capacity by checking existing invites/enrollments - randomly looks for replacements from waitlist Sends notifications to participants if selected/not selected

    • notifyWaitlistEntrants

      private void notifyWaitlistEntrants()
      Shows a dialog for the organizer to type a message, then sends a notification to all entrants with status "Waitlist".

    • showInviteDialog

      private void showInviteDialog(String eventId, String eventName)
      Shows a dialog allowing the organizer to search for an entrant by email to invite them.

    • sendPrivateInvite

      private void sendPrivateInvite(String targetDeviceId, String eventId, String eventName, com.google.firebase.firestore.DocumentSnapshot userDoc)
      Pushes the notification and adds the user to the event's waiting list as Pending.
